conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
That helps, honestly. So, let's start with the basics. What's been going on in your life recently that made you decide to reach out for support?
To be honest, it's just been really tough lately. I'm a paramedic and I've always prided myself on being able to handle anything that comes my way.
That sounds like a lot of responsibility. How has your job been impacting your daily life these days?
It's been rough. I've been having trouble sleeping and when I do, it's only for a few hours. Then I wake up feeling exhausted.
Sorry to hear that. Do you find yourself getting tired during the day, or is it more of an all-the-time thing?
Yeah, it's like my energy levels just tanked overnight. Sometimes I feel like I'm running on empty.
That sounds really challenging. Have you noticed any changes in your appetite or eating habits recently?
Actually, yeah. I've been having trouble eating because nothing tastes good anymore. And even when I do force myself to eat, it's like my body just isn't absorbing the nutrients.
Okay, that makes sense. How about your interest and motivation levels? Are you finding pleasure in things you used to enjoy?
Honestly, no. It's all just feels so...mechanical now. I mean, I love my job as a paramedic, but even that doesn't give me the same rush it used to.
That sounds really tough. Have you noticed any changes in your mood or emotional state recently?
Yeah, I'd say I'm just feeling more...numb now. Like, everything feels flat and uninteresting.
Okay, that makes sense. It sounds like you're having a hard time finding joy or pleasure in things right now. What about social activities? Are you still connecting with friends and family?
Honestly, no. I just haven't had the energy to keep up with them like I used to.
Okay, that makes sense. Have you noticed any changes in your physical sensations or body feelings recently?
Yeah, I've been getting these weird muscle twitches sometimes. And my stomach's always been a bit off lately.
Sorry to hear that. What about recent stressful life events? Is there anything that stands out as particularly challenging for you?
Well, work's just been really piling on, and then my partner's been going through some stuff too...
Okay, it sounds like you're feeling a bit overwhelmed right now. What do you think would help you feel more supported or grounded during this time?
Honestly, I don't know. I've been trying to just power through everything.

It can be really tough to ask for help sometimes. But it sounds like that's exactly what you might need right now. Can we explore some ways you could start taking care of yourself and prioritizing your well-being?
Yeah, I guess that would be helpful.
Okay! Let's work on that together. What are some things that bring you joy or relaxation?
Honestly? I love spending time with my niece. She's just so full of energy and enthusiasm...
That sounds wonderful! Have you been able to make time for her lately?
No...I've just been too exhausted.
Okay, well let's work on making some time for that then. What are some small steps you could take this week to prioritize your self-care and well-being?
I don't know...maybe start with just taking a few minutes each morning to meditate or something?
That sounds like a great place to start! Can you commit to doing that for the next week, and we can check in on it then?
Yeah, okay.
Okay, sounds like we have some good steps to take. Remember, this is your space to prioritize yourself and work through what's going on. You're doing a great job just by showing up here today.
Thanks...I guess I needed that reminder.
Anytime! We'll check in again soon.
